motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def mostPoints(self, questions: List[List[int]]) -> int:
    points = 0
    for i in range(len(questions)):
        points += questions[i][0]
        if questions[i][1] <= 0:
            break
        questions[i][1] -= 1
    return points

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
